subcodes.first_line: Blessed are the souls who have quaffed from the wine of immortality and have been made to partake of the Kawthar of attainment unto His presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی از برای نفوسیکه از رحیق بقا نوشیده اند و از کوثر لقا مرزوق شده قسم
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @spiritual transformation, @high station of the true believer, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
